caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot and braids is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a dark green t-shirt with a red circular graphic on the chest. She wears over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone on a stand. In the background, a white wall features a black banner with the word "PODCAST" in white letters, the phrase "s Talk About It!", and a logo that includes the text "BESS TALK 101" and "Its A Unique Hustle". To her left, a framed photo shows a close-up of hands. On the table in front of her are several small cans and a logo that reads "BESS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a seated position, resting her chin on her hand in a thoughtful expression, with very minimal movement as she looks slightly off-camera.
